Entity Profile
P

Lewis Chapman

Person · First seen 3302-12-15 · 4 mentions
Active: 3302-12-15 → 3305-08-29
Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3305-08-29
Starship Enterprises Mining Campaign Concludes
Starship Enterprises' mining campaign concludes successfully with the opening of Miner Prospects asteroid base in LP 339-7. The base serves as SE Mining headquarters and supports the system's outer gas giants.
3305-08-22
Starship Enterprises Launches Mining Campaign
Starship Enterprises launches a mining campaign to construct a specialised installation and asteroid base in LP 339-7. The new starport Miner Prospects will serve as SE Mining's headquarters and benefit the system's outer reaches.
3302-12-22
Galactic News Wildlife Reserve Campaign Concludes
The Starship Enterprises Corporation's wildlife reserve campaign in the LP 339-7 system has concluded successfully, with commodities delivered to Whitson Orbital for a reserve on LP 339-7 4 A.
3302-12-15
Community Goal Putting LP 339 7 on the Map
Dr Lewis Chapman of the Starship Enterprises Corporation has announced plans to establish a wildlife reserve on LP 339-7 4 A, requesting pilots deliver various commodities and help neutralise agitators in the system.
